tagline: The fully managed ServiceNow ingestion connector in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available.
what_it_does: The fully managed ServiceNow ingestion connector in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available. Learn how to configure your ServiceNow instance for Databricks ingestion. Choose an authentication method The following authentication methods are supported: U2M OAuth (recommended) OAuth Resource Owner Password Credentials (ROPC) Databricks recommends U2M OAuth because it's the more secure approach.
why_it_matters: To reduce the frequency, you can modify the expiration period in ServiceNow or use ROPC.
plain_summary: The fully managed ServiceNow ingestion connector in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available. Learn how to configure your ServiceNow instance for Databricks ingestion.
key_takeaway: The fully managed ServiceNow ingestion connector in Lakeflow Connect is now generally available.
